name: original_size
description: The number of data points in this stream

name: resolution
description: The level of detail (sampling) in which this stream was returned. May take one of the following values: low, medium, high

name: series_type
description: The base series used in the case the stream was downsampled. May take one of the following values: distance, time

name: data
description: The sequence of velocity values for this stream, in meters per second
